	- Address "1730 S. Amphlett Blvd. Suite 200, San Mateo, CA

5. Verify top navigation elements:
	- Login/Sign up link
	- Social media icons (Pinterest, Instagram, Twitter, Facebook)

6. Verify main navigation menu:
	- Home
	- About Us
	- Shop
	- Offers
	- Blog
	- Contact Us
